name: Coney Island Boardwalk
notes: Boardwalk, beach, Nathan's, Wonder Wheel. Pair with the Mermaid Parade or Mermaid Spa.

name: Jacob Riis Park
notes: Gateway beach with an art-deco bathhouse and a famously queer-friendly stretch.

name: The High Line
notes: Elevated park on a former rail line. Walk it into the West Village or Hudson Yards.
